name: riannah's garden
summary: V1 is live on Cloudflare with closed-beta auth/RBAC, admin user provisioning, plant CRUD, watering+repot schedules/events, and post-v1 hardening now in main (auth validation, persistent login bootstrap, API security + HSTS + cross-domain + DNS-prefetch-control + tightened Permissions-Policy incl. browsing-topics/clipboard/publickey-credentials/window-management/local-fonts/screen-wake-lock disablement + COOP + COEP + CORP + Origin-Agent-Cluster + X-Download-Options + X-Robots-Tag + X-XSS-Protection + legacy CSP compatibility headers (X-Content-Security-Policy + X-WebKit-CSP) + CSP form-action none + Content-Language headers, CORS cache-key hardening via expanded Vary controls, auth cache-key isolation via merged `Vary: Cookie, Authorization`, __Host-rp_session cookie hardening with Priority=High, no-store cache-control + Surrogate-Control: no-store, and logout Clear-Site-Data response hardening promoted via verified develop deploy + release flow, plus CSP form-action hardening promoted in latest release sync, and strict session cookie same-site enforcement (`SameSite=Strict`) promoted via reconciled release PR #124 after develop deploy run `22516248836`, plus HSTS preload hardening (`max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload`) promoted via reconciled release PR #128, and cookie-clear compatibility hardening by appending explicit `Expires=Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT` to `__Host-rp_session` clear flow promoted via reconciled release PR #130 after develop deploy run `22516388784`, plus expanded Permissions-Policy hardening with `speaker-selection=()` promoted via reconciled release PR #133 after develop deploy run `22516453476`, and cross-site state-changing request hardening via fetch-metadata/origin guard (403 on unsafe cross-site mutations) promoted via reconciled release PR #137 after develop deploy run `22516575203`, plus Permissions-Policy `web-share=()` disablement promoted via reconciled release PR #140 after develop deploy run `22516690741`).
